chapter: Indications for Non-organ-specific Whole Body Imaging

differentials.name: Breasts: increased uptake under stimulus of menarche, estrogens, pregnancy, lactation, phenothiazine medication, renal failure, hypothalamic lesion
differentials.raw: Breasts: increased uptake under stimulus of menarche, estrogens, pregnancy, lactation, phenothiazine medication, renal failure, hypothalamic lesion

differentials.name: Liver: suppressed uptake by chemotherapeutic agents / high levels of circulating iron / irradiation / severe acute liver disease
differentials.raw: Liver: suppressed uptake by chemotherapeutic agents / high levels of circulating iron / irradiation / severe acute liver disease

differentials.name: Salivary glands: uptake within first 6 months after radiation therapy to neck
differentials.raw: Salivary glands: uptake within first 6 months after radiation therapy to neck (may persist for years)

differentials.name: Previous steroid therapy, chemotherapy, and radiation therapy may decrease Ga uptake
differentials.raw: Previous steroid therapy, chemotherapy, and radiation therapy may decrease Ga uptake
